explanation: The requirement states that the patient must not be connected to the breathing circuit whenever the system is powered on and actively undergoing its Start-up or Self-Test Mode. This is captured by ensuring that when the condition '!off & (StartUpMode | SelfTestMode)' is met, '!patientConnected' is immediately satisfied.
decision1_substring: when the system is powered on and through start-up and self-test
decision3_substring: The patient shall not be connected to the breathing circuit

This is captured by ensuring that when the condition '(StartUpMode | SelfTestMode)' is met, '!patientConnected' is immediately satisfied.
decision1_substring: when the system is powered on and through start-up and self-test
decision3_substring: The patient shall not be connected to the breathing circuit
